method: corePathwayIds are derived from role-family/role primarySubjectIds; adjacentPathwayIds are derived from role-family/role adjacentSubjectIds; legacy fields are retained only for audit/review.

selectionRules.main: Use corePathwayIds, rank by profile fit, show strongest pathways with minimum fallback.
selectionRules.adjacent: Use adjacentPathwayIds, exclude any selected core pathways, rank by profile fit, show only good/strong/standout candidates.
selectionRules.noCareerWorldLeakage: Do not use adjacentCareerWorldIds to pull whole worlds of pathways.
